name: bento-grid
description: 便当盒网格风格 - 不对称但严密贴合的圆角卡片矩阵，高密度信息海报化排布

typography.headers: Inter / SF Pro Display / Helvetica Neue
typography.body: Inter / SF Pro Text / DM Sans
typography.numbers: SF Mono / Geist Mono / Inter Tight

prompt_template: Bento Grid PPT slide, modular rounded rectangle card layout, asymmetric but tightly aligned grid, clean neutral background {background}, accent colors {palette}, hero title block, smaller KPI cards, product screenshot module, crisp hierarchy, subtle shadows, premium product showcase aesthetic, polished information design, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: messy collage, brutalist black outlines, cyberpunk neon, vintage paper, photorealistic people, excessive gradients, ornate decoration, loose spacing, chaotic infographic clutter
